        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# PBX Call Centre — Role-based login",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "A clean, professional web app for a PBX call centre with role-based authentication and role-specific dashboards.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Roles",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "| Role        | Route        | Description                    |",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "|------------|--------------|--------------------------------|",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "| Super Admin| &#96;/superadmin&#96;| Full system overview &amp; control |",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "| Admin      | &#96;/admin&#96;     | Team &amp; queue management        |",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "| User       | &#96;/user&#96;      | View &amp; reports                 |",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| Agent      | &#96;/agent&#96;     | Take calls, make outbound calls|",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "## Demo login",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Password:** &#96;demo123&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Username:** type one of &#96;agent&#96;, &#96;admin&#96;, &#96;user&#96;, &#96;superadmin&#96; (or leave blank and choose the same from the Role dropdown).",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- Choose **Role**, enter **Password** &#96;demo123&#96;, then **Sign in**. You are redirected to that role’s page.",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "## Run locally (frontend only, demo auth)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "npm install",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "npm run dev",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "Open the URL shown in the terminal (e.g. http://localhost:5173).",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "**If \"not running\" or you see &#96;Error: spawn EPERM&#96;:**",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- Run the command in a **normal terminal** (outside Cursor), or run the terminal as Administrator.",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- On Windows, antivirus can block Node/Vite; allow the project folder or try temporarily disabling.",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- Then run: &#96;npm run dev&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "## Database and API (real auth)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **MySQL:** Install MySQL and create a user that can create databases (or use root). Copy &#96;.env.example&#96; to &#96;.env&#96; and set &#96;DB_HOST&#96;, &#96;DB_USER&#96;, &#96;DB_PASSWORD&#96; (and optionally &#96;DB_NAME&#96;, default &#96;pbx_callcentre&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Create DB and seed users:**",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm install",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm run seed",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "   This creates the &#96;pbx_callcentre&#96; database, runs [docs/database-schema.sql](docs/database-schema.sql), and inserts users: **superadmin**, **admin**, **user**, **agent** (password: **demo123**).",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Start the API server:**",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm run server",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "   API runs at http://localhost:3001 (or &#96;PORT&#96; in &#96;.env&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Start the frontend** (in another terminal):",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm run dev",
            "lineNumber": 53
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3603470027446747
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\src\\components\\ProtectedRoute.jsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 29
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { Navigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "const ROLE_ROUTES = {",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  superadmin: '/superadmin',",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  admin: '/admin',",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  user: '/user',",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  agent: '/agent',",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "export function ProtectedRoute({ children, allowedRoles }) {",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { user } = useAuth();",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  const location = useLocation();",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!user) {",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    return &lt;Navigate to=\"/login\" state={{ from: location }} replace /&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (allowedRoles &amp;&amp; !allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    const redirectTo = ROLE_ROUTES[user.role] || '/';",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    return &lt;Navigate to={redirectTo} replace /&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  return children;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getRoleRedirectPath(role) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  return ROLE_ROUTES[role] || '/';",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.348477840423584

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\database-schema.sql",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "-- PBX Call Centre - New database schema",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Do not use old MySQL schema; Asterisk integration concept remains identical (agents, queues, originate, AMI/HTTP).",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS pbx_callcentre",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  DEFAULT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "USE pbx_callcentre;",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "-- =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "-- ROLES: 1=superadmin, 2=admin, 3=user, 4=campaign (optional), 5=agent",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "-- =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  username VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  email VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  role TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  parent_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  account_status TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  permission_group_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  services JSON DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  change_password_required TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  soft_phone_login_status TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  soft_phone_extension_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  phone_login_name VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  phone_login_number VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  phone_login_password VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  team_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  login_status TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0,",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  last_login_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_parent (parent_id),",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_role (role),",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_permission_group (permission_group_id)",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": ") ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Permission groups (replaces user_group)",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_groups (",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  tenant_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 43
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.31804001331329346
    },

          {
            "text": "class Welcome extends MeowBilla_Controller {",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "\tfunction _remap($method, $args)",

          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpublic function index($screen_type='agent', $args = array())",

            "lineNumber": 21
          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 25

          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t$this-&gt;db-&gt;update(\"active_server\",[\"Active\"=&gt;0,\"LastUpdateTime\"=&gt;date(\"Y-m-d H:i:s\")]);",

          {

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t$this-&gt;db-&gt;insert(\"active_server\",[\"ServerID\"=&gt;$ServerID,\"Active\"=&gt;1,\"LastUpdateTime\"=&gt;date(\"Y-m-d H:i:s\")]);",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif ($this-&gt;session-&gt;userdata('logged_in')) {",

          },

          },

            "text": "import { createContext, useContext, useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';",

          },

            "lineNumber": 9

          {

          {

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "// Demo fallback when API is not available",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "const DEMO_USERS = {",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "export function AuthProvider({ children }) {",

          },
          {
            "text": "  const [user, setUser] = useState(() =&gt; {",

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "text": "defined('BASEPATH') OR exit('No direct script access allowed');",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "class Dashboard extends MeowBilla_Controller {",

          },
          {
            "text": "        $this-&gt;load-&gt;database();",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "    function _remap($method, $args)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " ",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "           if (method_exists($this, $method))",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "           {",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "               $this-&gt;$method($args);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "           }",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "           else",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "           {",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "                $this-&gt;index($method, $args);",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "           }",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    public function index($value='agent', $args = array())",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$controller_view_path=APPPATH.'views/user/Dashboard/Dashboard.php';",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$controller_view=\"user/Dashboard/Dashboard\";",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        if ( ! file_exists($controller_view_path))",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "                // Whoops, we don't have a page for that!",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "                show_404();",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$this-&gt;check_session(\"user\");",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$data['title'] = ucfirst('dashboard');",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$data['session'] = $this-&gt;session-&gt;userdata();",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$data['user_permission'] = $this-&gt;db-&gt;query(\"SELECT * FROM user_group WHERE GroupID='\".$data['session']['permission_group'].\"' AND AdminID='\".$data['session']['parent_id'].\"'\")-&gt;row();",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t//print_r($data['session']);print_r($data['user_permission']); exit;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$this-&gt;load_views_site($data, [$controller_view]);",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 50
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 86
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "4. **Start the frontend** (in another terminal):",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm run dev",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "   Vite proxies &#96;/api&#96; to the backend, so login uses the real API. If the API is not running, login falls back to demo auth (same passwords).",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Create new users to test (optional):**  ",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;npm run add-user -- &lt;username&gt; &lt;password&gt; &lt;role&gt;&#96;  ",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "   Example: &#96;npm run add-user -- myadmin mypass123 admin&#96; and &#96;npm run add-user -- agent1 agentpass123 agent&#96;. Then log in with those credentials to confirm database auth works.",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "**If the dev server does not start** (e.g. &#96;spawn EPERM&#96;), run &#96;npm run dev&#96; in a normal system terminal (not inside a restricted sandbox) or as Administrator.",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "**Option B – Install and start MySQL:** See [docs/MYSQL-SETUP.md](docs/MYSQL-SETUP.md) for step-by-step install and start on Windows, macOS, and Linux.",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "## Features",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Login:** Role selection, username (optional), password. Redirects to the correct dashboard by role.",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Protected routes:** Unauthenticated users go to &#96;/login&#96;. Authenticated users without access to a role are redirected to their own role’s page.",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Agent dashboard:** Status (Available, On call, Break, Away), dial pad, outbound call, “Simulate incoming call”, contacts list, recent calls.",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Super Admin / Admin / User:** Dashboards with stats and quick actions (UI placeholders for PBX integration).",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "## Tech",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "- React 19 + Vite 7, react-router-dom 7",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "- Backend: Node, Express, MySQL2, bcrypt, express-session",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "- Auth: session cookie; login/me/change-password APIs; demo fallback when API is down",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "To plug in a real PBX, replace the demo auth in &#96;src/context/AuthContext.jsx&#96; with your API and wire the Agent dial/call actions to your telephony backend.",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "## Database (new schema)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "When implementing the full PBX feature set (see plan in &#96;.cursor/plans/&#96; or repo docs):",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use a **new database** (e.g. &#96;pbx_callcentre&#96;), not the old MySQL schema.",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "- New schema is defined in [docs/database-schema.sql](docs/database-schema.sql) (users, permissions, agent status, queues, extensions, trunks, CDR, reports, etc.).",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Asterisk integration concept** (agent login/logout, originate, transfer, queue membership, AMI/HTTP) stays **identical**; only the app’s data lives in the new DB.",
            "lineNumber": 86
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2975442409515381
    },
    {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\add-user.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 38,
            "column": 62
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import 'dotenv/config';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "import bcrypt from 'bcrypt';",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { query } from './db.js';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "const ROLE_IDS = { superadmin: 1, admin: 2, user: 3, campaign: 4, agent: 5 };",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "async function addUser(username, password, roleName, parentId) {",
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const role = ROLE_IDS[roleName?.toLowerCase()];",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!role) {",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Role must be: superadmin, admin, user, or agent');",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    process.exit(1);",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!username || !password) {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Usage: node server/add-user.js &lt;username&gt; &lt;password&gt; &lt;role&gt; [parent_id]');",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Example: node server/add-user.js myadmin mypass123 admin');",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('For agents (to see extensions): node server/add-user.js agent2 demo123 agent 2');",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    process.exit(1);",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const parent = role === 5 &amp;&amp; parentId != null ? parseInt(parentId, 10) : null;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    await query(",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 0)&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      [username, hash, &#96;${username}@localhost&#96;, role, parent]",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.log(&#96;User created: ${username} (role: ${roleName}${parent != null ? &#96;, parent_id=${parent}&#96; : ''})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (err) {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (err.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      console.error(&#96;Username \"${username}\" already exists. Choose a different username.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      console.error('Failed:', err.message);",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    process.exit(1);",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  process.exit(0);",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "const [, , username, password, role, parentId] = process.argv;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.23216569423675537

          {
            "text": "router.get('/extensions', async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tenantId = req.agentUser.parent_id;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    const userId = req.agentUser.id;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (tenantId == null) {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.json({ success: true, extensions: [] });",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    let rows;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      rows = await query(",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        &#96;SELECT e.id, e.name,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "          (u.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS in_use,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "          (u.user_id = ?) AS in_use_by_me",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "         FROM sip_extensions e",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "         LEFT JOIN agent_extension_usage u ON u.extension_id = e.id",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "         WHERE e.tenant_id = ?",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "         ORDER BY e.name&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        [userId, tenantId]",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (joinErr) {",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "      const msg = String(joinErr?.message || joinErr || '');",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (msg.includes('agent_extension_usage') || msg.includes(\"doesn't exist\") || joinErr?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        rows = await query(",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "          'SELECT id, name FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ? ORDER BY name',",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "          [tenantId]",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        rows = rows.map((r) =&gt; ({ ...r, in_use: 0, in_use_by_me: 0 }));",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        throw joinErr;",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    const extensions = rows.map((r) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: r.id,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      name: r.name,",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      in_use: !!(r.in_use ?? 0),",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      in_use_by_me: !!(r.in_use_by_me ?? 0),",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    }));",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    return res.json({ success: true, extensions });",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (err) {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('Agent extensions error:', err);",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to load extensions' });",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 59

            "text": "-- PBX Call Centre - New database schema",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Do not use old MySQL schema; Asterisk integration concept remains identical (agents, queues, originate, AMI/HTTP).",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS pbx_callcentre",

          {

          },

            "text": "-- =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (",

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  account_status TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },

            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  services JSON DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\routes\\agent.js",

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "router.post('/select-extension', async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { extension_id, extension_name } = req.body || {};",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tenantId = req.agentUser.parent_id;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    const userId = req.agentUser.id;",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (tenantId == null) {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'No tenant assigned' });",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    let extension;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (extension_id) {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      const rows = await query(",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        'SELECT id, name FROM sip_extensions WHERE id = ? AND tenant_id = ?',",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "        [extension_id, tenantId]",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      extension = rows[0];",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (extension_name) {",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      const rows = await query(",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        'SELECT id, name FROM sip_extensions WHERE name = ? AND tenant_id = ?',",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        [String(extension_name).trim(), tenantId]",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      extension = rows[0];",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!extension) {",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid extension' });",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "      const existing = await query(",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "        'SELECT user_id FROM agent_extension_usage WHERE extension_id = ?',",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        [extension.id]",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (existing.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "        const existingUserId = existing[0].user_id;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (Number(existingUserId) !== Number(userId)) {",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "          return res.status(400).json({",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "            success: false,",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "            error: 'This extension is already in use by another agent. Please choose a different extension.',",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "          });",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        req.session.agentExtension = { id: extension.id, name: extension.name };",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        return res.json({ success: true, extension: req.session.agentExtension });",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "      await query(",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "        'INSERT INTO agent_extension_usage (extension_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)',",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        [extension.id, userId]",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (usageErr) {",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "      const msg = String(usageErr?.message || usageErr || '');",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!msg.includes('agent_extension_usage') &amp;&amp; !msg.includes(\"doesn't exist\") &amp;&amp; usageErr?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        throw usageErr;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    req.session.agentExtension = { id: extension.id, name: extension.name };",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    return res.json({ success: true, extension: req.session.agentExtension });",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\old\\US4TC\\US4GROUP\\APP\\controllers\\admin\\Extension.php",

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tpublic function showExtensionList()",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$valid_columns = [\"id\",\"AdminID\",\"name\",\"ipaddr\",\"port\",\"host\",\"type\",\"secret\",\"dtmfmode\"];",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        $table_name=\"sippeers\";",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        $draw = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"draw\"));",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        $start = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"start\"));",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        $length = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"length\"));",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        $order = $this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"order\");",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search= $this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"search\");",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search = $search['value'];",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        //Custom Fields Value",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_campaign_id= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_campaign_id\");",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_lead_name= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_lead_name\");",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_lead_status= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_lead_status\");",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_agent_last_activity= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_agent_last_activity\");",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        $admin_id=$this-&gt;session-&gt;userdata('user_id');",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        //Custom Value End",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        $col = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "        $dir = \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($order))",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "            foreach($order as $o)",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "                $col = $o['column'];",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "                $dir= $o['dir'];",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        if($dir != \"asc\" &amp;&amp; $dir != \"desc\")",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            $dir = \"desc\";",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!isset($valid_columns[$col]))",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "            $order = null;",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        else",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "            $order = $valid_columns[$col];",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "        if($order !=null)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "            $this-&gt;db-&gt;order_by($order, $dir);",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($search))",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "            $x=0;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "            foreach($valid_columns as $sterm)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "                if($x==0)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "                    $this-&gt;db-&gt;like($sterm,$search);",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",

          },
          {
            "text": "                else",

          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "                    $this-&gt;db-&gt;or_like($sterm,$search);",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "                $x++;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "            }                 ",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "        $this-&gt;db-&gt;limit($length,$start);",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($search_campaign_id))",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "            $this-&gt;db-&gt;where(\"CampaignID\",$search_campaign_id);",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 108
          }
        ]
      },

          },
          {
            "text": "                  onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedId(e.target.value)}",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "                  required",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "                  disabled={extensions.length === 0}",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "                &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;option value=\"\"&gt;Select extension&lt;/option&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "                  {extensions.map((ext) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const inUseByOther = ext.in_use &amp;&amp; !ext.in_use_by_me;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const label = ext.in_use_by_me",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "                      ? &#96;${ext.name} (Your extension)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "                      : inUseByOther",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "                        ? &#96;${ext.name} (In use)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "                        : ext.name;",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "                    return (",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;option",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "                        key={ext.id}",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "                        value={ext.id}",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "                        disabled={inUseByOther}",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "                        {label}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;/option&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "                    );",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "                  })}",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;/select&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "              &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "              {extensions.length === 0 &amp;&amp; (",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;p className=\"extension-select-empty\"&gt;No extensions found for your account. Ask your admin to add SIP extensions.&lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "              )}",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "              {(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "                const selectedExt = extensions.find((e) =&gt; String(e.id) === selectedId);",
            "lineNumber": 124
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\old\\asterisk\\users.conf",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 94
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "; User configuration",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "; Creating entries in users.conf is a \"shorthand\" for creating individual",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "; entries in each configuration file.  Using users.conf is not intended to",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "; provide you with as much flexibility as using the separate configuration",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "; files (e.g. sip.conf, iax.conf, etc) but is intended to accelerate the",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "; simple task of adding users.  Note that creating individual items (e.g.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "; custom SIP peers, IAX friends, etc.) will allow you to override specific",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "; parameters within this file.  Parameter names here are the same as they",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "; appear in the other configuration files.  There is no way to change the",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "; value of a parameter here for just one subsystem.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "[general]",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "; Full name of a user",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "fullname = New User",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "; Starting point of allocation of extensions",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "userbase = 6000",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "; Create voicemail mailbox and use use macro-stdexten",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "hasvoicemail = yes",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "; Set voicemail mailbox 6000 password to 1234",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "vmsecret = 1234",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "; Create SIP Peer",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "hassip = yes",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "; Create IAX friend",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "hasiax = yes",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "; Create H.323 friend",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": ";hash323 = yes",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "; Create manager entry",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "hasmanager = no",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "; Set permissions for manager entry (see manager.conf.sample for documentation)",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "; (defaults to *all* permissions)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": ";managerread = system,call,log,verbose,command,agent,user,config",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": ";managerwrite = system,call,log,verbose,command,agent,user,config",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "; MAC Address for res_phoneprov",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": ";macaddress = 112233445566",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "; Auto provision the phone with res_phoneprov",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": ";autoprov = yes",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "; Line Keys for hardphone",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": ";LINEKEYS = 1",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "; Line number for hardphone",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": ";linenumber = 1",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "; Local Caller ID number used with res_phoneprov and Asterisk GUI",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": ";cid_number = 6000",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "; Remaining options are not specific to users.conf entries but are general.",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "callwaiting = yes",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "threewaycalling = yes",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "callwaitingcallerid = yes",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "transfer = yes",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "canpark = yes",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "cancallforward = yes",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "callreturn = yes",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "callgroup = 1",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "pickupgroup = 1",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": ";nat = no",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": ";[6000]",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": ";fullname = Joe User",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": ";description = Courtesy Phone In Lobby    ; Used to provide a description of the",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "                                          ; peer in console output",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": ";email = joe@foo.bar",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": ";secret = 1234",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": ";dahdichan = 1",
            "lineNumber": 94
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3488955497741699
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tpublic function showExtensionList()",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$valid_columns = [\"ID\",\"AdminID\",\"name\",\"extension_description\"];",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        $table_name=\"sip_extension\";",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        $draw = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"draw\"));",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        $start = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"start\"));",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        $length = intval($this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"length\"));",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        $order = $this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"order\");",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search= $this-&gt;input-&gt;post(\"search\");",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search = $search['value'];",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        //Custom Fields Value",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_campaign_id= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_campaign_id\");",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_lead_name= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_lead_name\");",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_lead_status= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_lead_status\");",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "        $search_agent_last_activity= $this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post(\"search_agent_last_activity\");",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        $admin_id=$this-&gt;session-&gt;userdata('user_id');",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        //Custom Value End",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        $col = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "        $dir = \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($order))",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "            foreach($order as $o)",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "                $col = $o['column'];",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "                $dir= $o['dir'];",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        if($dir != \"asc\" &amp;&amp; $dir != \"desc\")",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            $dir = \"desc\";",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!isset($valid_columns[$col]))",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "            $order = null;",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        else",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "            $order = $valid_columns[$col];",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "        if($order !=null)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "            $this-&gt;db-&gt;order_by($order, $dir);",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($search))",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "            $x=0;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "            foreach($valid_columns as $sterm)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "                if($x==0)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "                    $this-&gt;db-&gt;like($sterm,$search);",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "                else",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "                    $this-&gt;db-&gt;or_like($sterm,$search);",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "                $x++;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "            }                 ",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "        $this-&gt;db-&gt;limit($length,$start);",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "        $this-&gt;db-&gt;select($valid_columns);",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(!empty($search_campaign_id))",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "            $this-&gt;db-&gt;where(\"CampaignID\",$search_campaign_id);",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 108
          }
        ]
      },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "        $result = $query-&gt;row();",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "        if(isset($result)) return $result-&gt;num;",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 184
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\old\\US4TC\\US4GROUP\\APP\\controllers\\Asterisk\\API\\US4GROUP_GetExtensionDetail.php",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 40,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "&lt;?php",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "defined('BASEPATH') OR exit('No direct script access allowed');",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "class US4GROUP_GetExtensionDetail extends MeowBilla_Controller {",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpublic function __construct()",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "        parent::__construct();",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "        $this-&gt;load-&gt;database();",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprivate $ExtensionType = \"CONTINUE\";",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprivate $HangupCause = \"Valid Extension\";",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprivate $ExtensionNumber = \"0\";",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprivate $ExtensionTimeout = \"45\";",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\t",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpublic function index()",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\t{",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$ExtensionID=(int)preg_replace(\"/\\D/\",\"\",$this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post('ExtensionID'));",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$UserID=(int)preg_replace(\"/\\D/\",\"\",$this-&gt;input-&gt;get_post('UserID'));",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$IsExtensionExist=$this-&gt;db-&gt;query(\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS IsExist FROM sip_extension WHERE  ID='\".$ExtensionID.\"' AND AdminID=$UserID LIMIT 1\")-&gt;row()-&gt;IsExist;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif($IsExtensionExist!=1)",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t{",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t$this-&gt;HangupCause = \"Extension Not Exist\".$this-&gt;asterisk_print_query();",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t$this-&gt;ExtensionType='HANGUP';",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t$this-&gt;SendResponseToAsterisk();",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$ExtensionDetail=$this-&gt;db-&gt;query(\"SELECT name FROM sip_extension WHERE ID='\".$ExtensionID.\"' AND AdminID='$UserID' LIMIT 1\")-&gt;row();",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$ExtensionNumber=$ExtensionDetail-&gt;name;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$this-&gt;ExtensionNumber = $ExtensionNumber;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$this-&gt;SendResponseToAsterisk();",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprivate function SendResponseToAsterisk()",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t{",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$this-&gt;ResponseToAsterisk = [$this-&gt;ExtensionType,$this-&gt;HangupCause,$this-&gt;ExtensionNumber,$this-&gt;ExtensionTimeout];",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t$Response = implode(\",\",$this-&gt;ResponseToAsterisk);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\techo $Response;exit;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 41
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.32485759258270264
    },
